zh.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castro是Rodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTRO和Estevainha Peres的兒子，於1139年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多。他和Elvira Osores至少有1個女兒。他去世於1234年在西班牙享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castro是Rodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTRO和Estevainha Peres的儿子，于1139年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多。他和Elvira Osores至少有1个女儿。他去世于1234年在西班牙享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rodriguez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Luis, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Pedro, Raul, Miguel, Roberto, Ramon, Rafael.  Portuguese Wenceslao, Ligia, Catarina, Paulo, Joaquim, Omero, Joao, Wenseslao, Adauto, Albeiro, Godofredo.

Spanish (Rodríguez) and Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Rodrigo . Rodriguez (including in the sense 2 below) is the ninth most frequent surname in the US. Compare De Rodriguez and Rodriquez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Rodiguez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Pedro, Raul, Adriana, Alvaro, Ana Luz, Angel, Armando, Arnulfo.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodriquez
meanings: Spanish (Rodríquez): variant of Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ). This surname is very rare in Spain.

variants.name: Rodriges
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodreguez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodrigo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Elena, Rafael, Alfonso, Alicia, Angel, Araceli, Benardo, Carlos, Carlota, Cristina, Emilio.  Indian Devi, Dileep, Dilip, Gamini, Mahendra, Manoj, Sunil, Tilak.

Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Rodrigo, from ancient Germanic Hrōdrīc, a compound of hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + rīc ‘power, kingdom’. Rodrigo is one of the most important Spanish personal names of ancient Germanic origin. It was borne by the last of the Visigoth kings and by a Christian saint, Saint Roderick, one of the 9th-century martyrs of Córdoba. This surname is also found in and around some of the former Portuguese territories of western India.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Jorge, Miguel, Francisco, Mario, Pedro, Raul.  Portuguese Joao, Paulo, Ligia, Vasco, Wenceslao, Armanda, Fernandes.

Galician, Portuguese, and Jewish (Sephardic): topographic name from castro ‘castle, fortress’ (from Latin castrum ‘fort, Roman walled city’), or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word. See also De Castro .

Italian and Jewish (from Italy): topographic name for someone who lived by a fortification, from castro ‘fortification’ (see 1 above) or a habitational name for someone from the town of Castro, the center of a Duchy in Lazio (destroyed after its occupation by Papal military forces in 1649). Compare Lo Castro .

variants.name: Alcazar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Francisco, Luis, Manuel, Juan, Julio, Rafael, Raul, Ruben, Alicia, Gustavo.

Spanish (Alcázar): habitational name from any of various places, for example in the provinces of Ciudad Real, Cuenca, and Granada, named with the word alcázar ‘citadel’ or ‘palace’ (from Arabic al ‘the’ + qaṣr ‘fortress’, a borrowing of Latin castrum; compare Castro ).

variants.name: De Castro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Armando, Mario, Alfredo, Jorge, Julio, Manuel, Ricardo, Rolando, Alvaro.
Galician and Portuguese: habitational name for someone from any of various places called with castro ‘castle, fortress’ (see Castro ), with the preposition de ‘of, from’.

variants.name: Castrillo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jorge, Angel, Carlos, Emilio, Guillermo, Ramon, Alberto, Alejandro, Ana, Benito.
Spanish: habitational name from any of various places, especially in León, named Castrillo, from castrillo ‘fort’, a diminutive of Castro .

variants.name: Castronovo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Santo, Cosimo, Giacomo, Graziella, Sal, Stefano.
Italian (southern): habitational name from any of various places called Castronovo, from castro ‘fortification’ (see Castro ) + novo ‘new’.

nameMeanings.name: Caballero
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Francisco, Carlos, Jesus, Raul, Jorge, Miguel, Pedro.
Spanish: occupational name from caballero ‘knight, horseman’ (from Late Latin caballarius ‘mounted soldier’).

variants.name: Caballeros
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Guatemala): plural form of   Caballero   ‘knight’.

variants.name: Cavallero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Aldo, Angelo, Dario, Secondo.  Spanish Alejandro, Angel, Felipe, Jose, Susana, Zulma.  French Michel.
Italian (mainly Piedmont and Liguria): equivalent of Spanish   Caballero   ‘horseman, knight’. This surname is also found in southern France.

nameMeanings.name: Gutierrez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jesus, Manuel, Carlos, Francisco, Jorge, Pedro, Raul, Miguel, Roberto.

Spanish (Gutiérrez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Gutierre, from a Visigothic personal name of uncertain form and meaning, perhaps a compound of the elements gunthi ‘battle’ + hairus ‘sword’.

variants.name: Gutierez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Jose, Ignacio, Manuel, Adalberto, Ana Maria, Angel, Carlota, Emilio, Exiquio, Felipe, Fermin.
Hispanic (Gutiérez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Gutirrez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guterrez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guiterrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Arturo, Francisco, Alfredo, Jesus, Rafael, Raul, Carlos, Guadalupe, Jose Luis.
Hispanic (Guitérrez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Gutierres
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ramon, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Alberto, Alfonzo, Alvaro, Ana, Andres, Antelmo, Catalina.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guitierez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guttierrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Jose, Pablo, Raul, Reina, Adolfo, Beatriz, Carlos, Diego, Evangelina, Felicita, Humberto.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guitierrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Enrique, Jaime, Manuel, Miguel, Ofelia, Ricardo, Salvador, Andres, Argentina, Armando.
Hispanic (Guitiérrez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castro was born in 1139, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain as the son of Rodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTRO and Estevainha Peres. He had at least 1 daughter with Elvira Osores. He died in 1234, in Spain, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castro est né en 1139, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, fils de Rodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTRO et Estevainha Peres. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Elvira Osores. Il est décédé en 1234, à Espagne, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castro wurde 1139 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien, als Sohn von Rodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTRO und Estevainha Peres geboren. Er hatte mit Elvira Osores mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1234 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castro è nato il nel 1139 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna come figlio di Rodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTRO e Estevainha Peres. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Elvira Osores. Morì nel 1234, nel Spagna, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castroは1139年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドでRodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTROとEstevainha Peresの息子として生まれた。彼はElvira Osoresとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1234年にスペインで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castro(은)는 1139년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Rodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTRO(와)과 Estevainha Peres의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Elvira Osores(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1234년 스페인에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castro nasceu em 1139, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha filho de Rodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTRO e Estevainha Peres. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Elvira Osores. Ele faleceu em 1234, em Espanha, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castro родился в 1139 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. Его родителей звали Rodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTRO и Estevainha Peres. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Elvira Osores. Он умер в 1234 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Caballero Gutierrez Rodriguez de Castro nació en 1139, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España como hijo de Rodrigo FERNÁNDEZ DE CASTRO y Estevainha Peres. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Elvira Osores. Murió en 1234, en España, a la edad de 95 años.
